member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the column/property that contains the value that can narrow the scope of entities that can receive this Tag. Entities where this column contains the Rock.Model.Tag.EntityTypeQualifierValue will be eligible to have this Tag. This property must be used in conjunction with the Rock.Model.Tag.EntityTypeQualifierValue property. If all entities of the specified Rock.Model.EntityType are eligible to use this Tag, this property will be null.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value in the Rock.Model.Tag.EntityTypeQualifierColumn that narrows the scope of entities that can receive this Tag. Entities that contain this value in the Rock.Model.Tag.EntityTypeQualifierColumn are eligible to use this Tag. This property must be used in conjunction with the Rock.Model.Tag.EntityTypeQualifierColumn property.

member.name: T:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.DynamicData.GridResultsBag
member.summary:
A bag that contains the grid results for the dynamic data block.
This will contain the grid definition and information about enabled grid features, but will not contain grid data rows; that data should instead be loaded on demand by the Obsidian grid client.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.DynamicData.GridResultsBag.GridDefinition
member.summary: Gets or sets the grid definition.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.DynamicData.GridResultsBag.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the grid's title.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.DynamicData.GridResultsBag.KeyField
member.summary:
Gets or sets the field that will be used to uniquely identify each row.
This may be a simple field name (i.e. "id") or a dot-separated path to the key value within a particular field's object (i.e. "person.idKey").

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.DynamicData.GridResultsBag.ShowCheckboxSelectionColumn

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Blocks.Reporting.PageParameterFilter.PageParameterFilterInitializationBox.FilterKeysWithStartupValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the keys of any filters whose default or startup values will need to be overridden if empty values are desired (e.g. if a textbox value is cleared in the UI that would otherwise have a default value if not overridden on the server, or a startup query string value that the server won't know has been cleared on subsequent block action requests). Identifying these specific keys up front allows us to avoid having to send every key/value filter pair on every request, and instead allows us to ONLY send these keys with empty values when needed.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.Labels.TextFieldConfigurationBag.AdaptiveFontSize
member.summary: Contains a lookup table of string length and font sizes as key and value pairs. The key represents the string length and the value is the font size. The value from the largest key that is less than or equal to the length of the text is used.
member.value: This is encoded as a set "key=value" pairs joined by semi-colon. Such as 10=16;20=14;30=12.

member.summary: The horizontal alignment of the text in the field.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.Labels.TextFieldConfigurationBag.IsBold
member.summary: Determines if the text is drawn bolder than normal text.
member.value: This should be the string "False" or "True".

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.Labels.TextFieldConfigurationBag.IsColorInverted
member.summary: Determines if the color is inverted when drawing. On Zebra printers will result in an already black background turning white and an already white background turning black. Other printers may simply switch to white mode.
member.value: This should be the string "False" or "True".

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.Labels.TextFieldConfigurationBag.IsCondensed
member.summary: Determines if the text is drawn in a more condensed font than normal text.
member.value: This should be the string "False" or "True".

member.summary: The maximum length of the text in the field. Any text of greater length will be truncated without any ellipsis. For collections of strings this maximum applies to each individual string.

member.summary: Gets the type of check-in experience to use. Family check-in allows more than one person in the family to be checked in at a time.

member.summary: Gets or sets the type of the family search configured for the configuration.
member.value: The type of the family search.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsAutoSelect
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether auto-select mode is enabled for this template. In auto-select mode all the selected information is displayed on the person select screen with an optional button to change those selections.
member.value: true if this auto-select mode is enabled; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsCheckoutAtKioskAllowed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to allow self-checkout on public kiosks for this configuration. When enabled, if an individual in the family is already checked in then the kiosk will prompt if they want to check-in another family member of checkout existing individuals.
member.value: true if self check-out mode is enabled; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsLocationCountDisplayed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the current location occupancy counts should be displayed when selecting a location.
member.value: true if current location occupancy counts should be displayed; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsOverrideAvailable
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether an override option is available in the kiosk supervisor screen. This allows an authorized support person to bypass check-in requirements.
member.value: true if the kiosk override option is available; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsPhotoHidden
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether individual photos should be hidden on public kiosks.
member.value: true if photos should be hidden; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsRemoveFromFamilyAtKioskAllowed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether removing people with a "can check-in" relationship from the family is allowed. This does not allow full family members to be removed.
member.value: true if can check-in relationship can be removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsSupervisorEnabled
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the supervisor screen is available to kiosks after entering a pin number.
member.value: true if the supervisor screen is available; otherwise, false.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.CheckIn.ConfigurationTemplateBag.IsSameOptionUsed
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether to attempt to use the same options from the first service when a person is checking into more than one service schedule.
member.value: true if the same options from the first service will be used; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Gets or sets the optional description that provides additional context about this specific item.

summary.para: Gets or sets the optional details. Each detail item will be displayed with the Value displayed as the "key" and the Text as the displayed value.
For example, if your detail item was Value="Campus" and Text="North Ridge" then it might display something like "Campus: North Ridge".

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Controls.UniversalItemSearchPickerItemBag.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional labels to display with the item. These are usually displayed as a colored pill style. The Text is displayed inside the label and the Value specifies the color name to use with label. Currently the standard bootstrap color names (primary, info, danger, etc.) are supported.

member.name: T:Rock.ViewModels.Core.NotificationMessageMetadataBag
member.summary: The standard metadata that will be used to display the notification.

summary.para: Gets or sets the photo URL. This is used to represent the source of the notification. For example, a notification that originates from an action a person took might use the person's photo.

The image should either be a full absolute URL including the scheme and hostname or should be a path only URL that begins with ~. If it is a path that begins with ~ then the URL will be automatically resolved to the proper scheme and hostname.
The image must be square and should be around 128x128 pixels in size.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Core.NotificationMessageMetadataBag.IconCssClass
member.summary: Gets or sets the icon CSS class. This is used in some places to give a visual representation to the type of message.

member.name: P:Rock.ViewModels.Core.NotificationMessageMetadataBag.Color
member.summary: Gets or sets the base color. This is used to calculate the background and foreground colors used when displaying certain parts of the notification message.
